title: Sweety's Garden
description: 🌼 Bring extra life to the Overworld's biomes with new flowers
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e624ce41aa0a635eb9cd6e5feae1a6011c90e695.png)

Sweety's Garden is a small mod, adding 16 new plants found all around the world, providing a bit of extra variety and life to a lot of overworld biomes. This mod also tries to highlight less common flowers (avoiding Rafflesias, Clover or Cattails).

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7KGEm4WAEcw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/iEMp1n2_B80" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
---

![birch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2168e38dcd2611811d31fa7ea3330659e986946_0.webp)

Some flowers will be relatively rare, to act as a nice uncommon sighting, but others, like Heather or Wood Anemone can be quite common.
This new plants won't be traded by Wandering Traders, but can all be bonemealed indefinitely to be duplicated.

![heather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b965bc2de1582fc89c5bd62649e9c8b4fefaa1b_0.webp)

The config file is able to disable any of those plants, if you don't like the generation of a feature (or if you feel like it wouldn't fit your modpack).

![savanna](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c881cc6ae17736e9802ba612f51a075693b9b66_0.webp)

Plants considered as small flowers can be used to craft dyes, and all small plants (outside of Wildflowers-type ones) can be potted.

![snowdrop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bbc16175fc7ef6cda220baa40d392a2d1ef9428_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Plants and the biomes they are found in</summary>

- Baileya : Desert 
- Bloody Dogwood : Snow slopes, Grove
- Busy Lizzie : Jungle, Sparse jungle
- Cyan Poppy : Stony peaks, Windswept gravelly hills 
- Drimia : Eroded badlands, Wooded badlands
- Edelweiss : Grove, Jagged peaks, Frozen peaks
- Heather : Windswept forest, Taiga, Snowy taiga
- Hepatica : Birch forest, Flower forest
- Pale Petals : Pale Garden
- Pampas : Savanna
- Passion Flower : Jungle
- Pontederia : Swamp
- Purple Shamrock : Dark forest
- Shaggy Purslane : Mangrove swamp
- Snowdrop : Snowy plains, Snowy taiga
- Wood Anemone : Old growth birch forest
- Wood Sorrel : Forest, Jungle
</details>


<details>
<summary>Some extra infos</summary>
  
- Baileya will generate with sandstone blocks nearby, as an indicator of the area's dryness
- Cyan Poppies are an hommage to Cyan Roses. They are relatively rare
- Edelweiss will always generate as a single flower
- Hepatica will generate as patchs, that will contain a variety of vanilla flowers, and Wood Anemones
- Passion Flowers will only generate on the side of additional fallen trees (they aren't the same as vanilla trees in 1.21.5+, and can be distinguished by the fact they are generally covered in more vegetation)
- Shaggy Purslane can generate on Mangrove Roots
- Snowdrop will only be found under Spruce Trees
- Wood Anemone will generate as patchs, that will contain a variety of vanilla flowers

</details>




Feel free to suggest your ideas, or to use this in your modpacks :D
You can also join our discord at [unusualsquad.com/discord](https://www.unusualsquad.com/discord)
